findings.title: post-work ループ後の error return 経路（result-file-not-found 等）への addedTurns 付与が受け入れ基準に未明示
findings.rationale: agent-runner.ts line 884（result file not found）などの error return 経路は postWork ループ完了後に到達しうるが、addedTurns を欠く。request 本文 R2 には「addedTurns を欠く return 経路があれば付与」と書かれており実質的には網羅指示だが、受け入れ基準には明示されていないため実装者が見落とすリスクがある。

observations.title: すべてのコード位置アサーションが実コードと一致することを確認
observations.rationale: types.ts:165, event-journal.ts:36-50/278-286/332/350-358, agent-runner.ts:763-779/771/908, port/agent-runner.ts:208, code-review.ts:86/139-158/161-175, report-tool.ts:95, judge-verdict.ts:38, code-fixer.ts:323 — すべて検証済み。バグ（postWork count-miss）は実在し、不変 reportRetry+outputRepair===followUpAttempts は postWork を含まないため修正は不変に影響しない。followUpPrompt は non-load-bearing であり除去は安全。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/added-turns-persist-and-review-trim/ on branch change/added-turns-persist-and-review-trim-f2aaa6c5.

Plan covers the three requirements (edit surfaces disjoint):

R1 (journal 永続化) — T-01: add optional `addedTurns` to StepAttemptRecord.outcome; write via stepRunToRecord and restore via fold using the existing conditional-spread pattern. Round-trip lossless; legacy records fold to undefined (backward compatible). Integrity checks line-JSON only, so field addition is safe.

R2 (adapter count-miss) — T-02: move `postWork++` before the post-work failure early-return (single increment point per consumed turn); add `addedTurns` to every return path lacking it (live counters for result-file-not-found; ADDED_TURNS_ZERO for pre-follow-up early returns and catch timeout/error). Invariant reportRetry + outputRepair === followUpAttempts preserved (postWork is a separate counter). Rejected the 4-counter hoist alternative to avoid changing followUpAttempts on catch paths.

R3 (code-review trim) — T-03: delete `followUpPrompt` from CodeReviewStep (getFollowUpPrompt was never defined), so postWorkPrompts becomes empty. Format guaranteed by the existing content-format outputContract; severity judged in the main review turn; routing derived from structured findings via deriveJudgeVerdict — the .md is not a routing input. Rejected adding per-row negative checks to the content-format seam.

Each task pins the acceptance-criteria tests (event-journal.test.ts round-trip + backward-compat; agent-runner.test.ts post-work-failure + invariant; code-review.test.ts followUpPrompt absence + format-compliant/violation via evaluateContentFormatChecks + judge-verdict routing lock). T-04 gates typecheck && test green and verifies scope-out areas (managed adapter, content-format negative checks, code-fixer legacy fallback) are untouched.
